title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1713 - No sales tax on food for counties in metropolitan park and recreation districts, when
text:
67.1713.  No sales tax on food for counties in metropolitan park and recreation districts, when. — Beginning January 1, 2002, there is hereby specifically exempted from the tax imposed pursuant to section 67.1712 all sales of food as defined by section 144.014.
(L. 2001 S.B. 203)
